title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.310 - Election of officers — removal — duties
text:
262.310.  Election of officers — removal — duties. — Every board of directors shall assemble within twenty days after their election and choose a president and vice president of their number, and a secretary, treasurer and such other officers, servants and agents as may be necessary, remove them from their office and prescribe their duties; and all proceedings of the board shall be public.
(RSMo 1939 § 14163) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12486; 1919 § 12055; 1909 § 687
